you_can_download: You can download your data in different formats.

info.1: You can export your log entries as a spreadsheet (CSV file).
info.2: This file can be imported into My Bible Log or opened in a spreadsheet program.

notes.title: Notes
notes.info: While exported notes cannot be automatically imported into My Bible Log, you can always re-create notes and tags manually.

notes_text_file.title: Notes Text File
notes_text_file.info: You can export your notes in a text file.

notes_json_file.title: Notes JSON File
notes_json_file.info: You also have the option of exporting your notes as a JSON file.
